cases.prompt: 내 9 회로 중에 노력 화폐가 뭐였지?

assertions.text: The agent reads wiki/index.md before opening content pages.
The answer cites the source pages with [[wikilink]] references.

cases.prompt: 내 AI 피벗이랑 SimonK-stack이 어떻게 연결돼?

assertions.text: The agent reads multiple wiki pages and synthesizes an answer.
If the synthesized answer has standalone value, the agent files it as a new wiki page and updates index.md and log.md.
The agent checks the wiki and raw/, finds nothing, and plainly says the wiki does not cover it instead of guessing.
